Enable suspend-on-idle for all Fly apps across all environments

Switch prod apps from auto_stop: off to suspend, and set
min_machines_running: 0 everywhere so machines suspend when idle
and auto-start on traffic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

input.command:
gh pr create --title "Enable suspend-on-idle for all Fly apps" --reviewer patflynn --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- Switch all prod apps (flux, balance, web) from `auto_stop_machines: "off"` to `"suspend"`
- Set `min_machines_running: 0` across all environments (prod, staging)
- Preview environments already had the correct settings and are unchanged

All machines will now suspend when idle and auto-start on incoming traffic.

## Test plan
- [ ] Verify `cue vet` passes in CI for all apps/environments
- [ ] Confirm machines suspend after deploy and wake on traffic

Run: 20260407-0854-676e
EOF
)" 2>&1

- **Staging** (flux, balance, web): `min_machines_running: 1` → `0` (already had suspend)
- **Preview** (all): already correct, no changes needed
